features.description: Blend header:value token overlap with serialized token overlap to capture schema-aware lexical agreement.
features.code:
def compute_feature(ctx):
    stats_a = ctx["stats_a"]
    stats_b = ctx["stats_b"]
    helpers = ctx["helpers"]
    hv = helpers["token_jaccard"](list(stats_a["header_value_token_set"]), list(stats_b["header_value_token_set"]))
    serial = helpers["token_jaccard"](list(stats_a["serial_token_set"]), list(stats_b["serial_token_set"]))
    return helpers["clip01"](0.6 * hv + 0.4 * serial)

features.description: Couple row density similarity with numeric median agreement to reward structured rows with consistent numeric scale.
features.code:
def compute_feature(ctx):
    stats_a = ctx["stats_a"]
    stats_b = ctx["stats_b"]
    helpers = ctx["helpers"]
    density = helpers["safe_ratio_float"](stats_a["nonempty_count"], stats_b["nonempty_count"])
    med_a = float(stats_a["numeric_median"])
    med_b = float(stats_b["numeric_median"])
    denom = max(abs(med_a), abs(med_b), 1.0)
    rel = abs(med_a - med_b) / float(denom)
    numeric = 1.0 / (1.0 + rel)
    return helpers["clip01"](0.5 * density + 0.5 * numeric)

features.description: Blend numeric-set overlap with relative median similarity to reward rows that share numeric content and scale.
features.code:
def compute_feature(ctx):
    stats_a = ctx["stats_a"]
    stats_b = ctx["stats_b"]
    helpers = ctx["helpers"]
    overlap = helpers["numeric_overlap_max"](stats_a["numeric_value_set"], stats_b["numeric_value_set"])
    med_a = float(stats_a["numeric_median"])
    med_b = float(stats_b["numeric_median"])
    denom = max(abs(med_a), abs(med_b), 1.0)
    rel = abs(med_a - med_b) / float(denom)
    median_sim = 1.0 / (1.0 + rel)
    return helpers["clip01"](0.55 * overlap + 0.45 * median_sim)

features.description: Combine serialized-row edit similarity with row density agreement to capture near-matches under small formatting drift.
features.code:
def compute_feature(ctx):
    stats_a = ctx["stats_a"]
    stats_b = ctx["stats_b"]
    helpers = ctx["helpers"]
    edit_sim = helpers["normalized_edit_similarity"](stats_a["serial_text"], stats_b["serial_text"])
    density = helpers["safe_ratio_float"](stats_a["nonempty_count"], stats_b["nonempty_count"])
    return helpers["clip01"](0.65 * edit_sim + 0.35 * density)

features.description: Use shared-header exactness together with header token overlap to capture schema-consistent row matches.
Bridge row token overlap with serialized 3-gram overlap to stabilize lexical evidence under spacing and ordering noise.
features.code:
def compute_feature(ctx):
    stats_a = ctx["stats_a"]
    stats_b = ctx["stats_b"]
    helpers = ctx["helpers"]
    tok = helpers["token_jaccard"](list(stats_a["token_set"]), list(stats_b["token_set"]))
    char3 = helpers["char_ngram_jaccard"](stats_a["serial_text"], stats_b["serial_text"], 3)
    return helpers["clip01"](0.5 * tok + 0.5 * char3)

features.description: Combine embedding similarity with numeric-scale agreement so semantic closeness is discounted when numeric signatures diverge strongly.
features.code:
def compute_feature(ctx):
    stats_a = ctx["stats_a"]
    stats_b = ctx["stats_b"]
    emb_a = ctx["emb_a"]
    emb_b = ctx["emb_b"]
    helpers = ctx["helpers"]
    cosine = helpers["cosine_similarity"](emb_a, emb_b)
    cosine01 = helpers["clip01"](0.5 * (cosine + 1.0))
    med_a = float(stats_a["numeric_median"])
    med_b = float(stats_b["numeric_median"])
    denom = max(abs(med_a), abs(med_b), 1.0)
    rel = abs(med_a - med_b) / float(denom)
    numeric = 1.0 / (1.0 + rel)
    return helpers["clip01"](0.55 * cosine01 + 0.45 * numeric)
